items.title_en: Cerebras bumps up IPO range as it looks to raise up to $4.8 billion

items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 对 OpenAI 与 Cerebras 合并持开放态度。现在，Cerebras 考虑最快在本周上市。

items.desc_en: Five passengers of the MV Hondius will be quarantined in Paris "until further notice", France's prime minister says.
items.desc_zh: 法国总理表示，MV Hondius 号的五名乘客将在巴黎接受隔离，“直至另行通知”。

items.title_en: Bread dresses and gowns inspired by cathedrals at Nigeria fashion spectacle
items.title_zh: 受尼日利亚时尚盛会大教堂启发的面包裙和礼服
items.desc_en: Celebrities, filmmakers and creators put up a performance at Africa's biggest night of film and fashion.
items.desc_zh: 名人、电影制作人和创作者在非洲最大的电影和时尚之夜进行了表演。

items.title_en: Iran warns against complying with US sanctions as Gulf attacks reported
items.title_zh: 据报道海湾袭击事件，伊朗警告不要遵守美国制裁
items.desc_en: The warning comes as a commercial vessel is hit off Qatar, and both the UAE and Kuwait report drone attacks.
items.desc_zh: 这一警告发出之际，一艘商船在卡塔尔附近被击中，阿联酋和科威特都报告了无人机袭击事件。

items.title_en: International cyber attack disrupts swathe of universities and schools
items.title_zh: 国际网络攻击扰乱了大片大学和学校
items.desc_en: A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across the globe.
items.desc_zh: 一个黑客组织入侵了全球数千所学校和大学使用的学术软件 Canvas。

items.title_en: Australian by-election a litmus test for right-wing One Nation Party
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚补选是右翼一国党的试金石
items.desc_en: Victory for the populist party in Farrer, New South Wales, would see One Nation's first MP elected to Australia's national parliament.
items.desc_zh: 如果民粹主义政党在新南威尔士州法雷尔获胜，一国党将成为澳大利亚国民议会的第一位议员。

items.title_en: TikTok rows back AI video descriptions in US after absurd errors
items.title_zh: TikTok 在美国因出现荒谬错误而收回人工智能视频描述
items.desc_en: While only rolled out to some TikTok users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.
items.desc_zh: 虽然仅向部分 TikTok 用户推出，但该功能由人工智能生成的奇异描述却被广泛分享。

items.title_en: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today- what does this mean for your DMs?
items.title_zh: Instagram 隐私技术今天关闭 - 这对您的私信意味着什么？
items.desc_en: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.
items.desc_zh: 该平台表示将删除端到端加密消息，这是母公司 Meta 的一个重大转变。

items.title_en: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
items.title_zh: 晒伤如何激发了一种储存能量的新方法
items.desc_en: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.
items.desc_zh: 能够捕获热量的分子可能是一种有用的供暖脱碳技术。

items.title_zh: Kofe Flow

items.title_en: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
items.title_zh: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
items.desc_en: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.
items.desc_zh: Meta表示Ofcom的计算“不成比例”； the regulator said it would defend its position.

items.title_en: Watch: Drone delivers first Amazon parcels in UK
items.title_zh: 观看：无人机在英国运送第一批亚马逊包裹
items.desc_en: The tech giant says it hopes to slowly expand the service as the demand for ultra-fast deliveries grows.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，随着对超快速交付的需求的增长，它希望慢慢扩大这项服务。

items.title_en: In 'Musk v Altman', this judge will make the final call
items.title_zh: 在“马斯克诉奥特曼”中，这位法官将做出最终决定
items.desc_en: The feud has fuelled a costly showdown between two tech titans.
items.desc_zh: 这场不和加剧了两家科技巨头之间代价高昂的摊牌。

items.title_en: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations
items.title_zh: 前 OpenAI 董事会成员表示埃隆·马斯克愿意捐献她的精子
items.desc_en: Shivon Zilis is the mother of four of Musk's children. That relationship began as she advised OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: Shivon Zilis 是马斯克四个孩子的母亲。这种关系始于她为 OpenAI 提供建议时。

items.title_en: Robot wars - what an operation in Ukraine tells us about the battlefield of the near future
items.title_zh: 机器人战争——乌克兰的一次行动告诉我们关于不久的将来的战场
items.desc_en: After Ukraine's President Zelensky said territory had been captured using just robots and drones, what is the future of unmanned warfare?
items.desc_zh: 在乌克兰总统泽伦斯基表示仅使用机器人和无人机就占领了领土之后，无人战争的未来是什么？

items.desc_zh: 检查、编辑和导出任何网站的设计

items.title_en: Apple to pay $250m to iPhone buyers over AI features lawsuit
items.title_zh: 苹果因 AI 功能诉讼向 iPhone 买家支付 2.5 亿美元
items.desc_en: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.
items.desc_zh: 去年的指控称，这家科技公司的 Apple Intelligence 广告欺骗了 iPhone 买家。

items.title_zh: ChatGPT for Google Sheets

items.title_en: 'I thought he was going to hit me' OpenAI co-founder says of Musk
items.title_zh: OpenAI 联合创始人谈到马斯克时说：“我以为他会打我”
items.desc_en: Brockman spoke during the second week of a month-long trial between Musk and OpenAI's Sam Altman.
items.desc_zh: 布罗克曼是在马斯克和 OpenAI 的萨姆·奥尔特曼为期一个月的试验的第二周发表讲话的。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: A sleep apnoea wearable. Plus, tech to free up hospital beds and a breast health app.
items.desc_zh: 睡眠呼吸暂停可穿戴设备。另外，还有可以腾出医院床位的技术和乳房健康应用程序。

items.title_en: US to safety test new AI models from Google, Microsoft, xAI
items.title_zh: 美国将对谷歌、微软、xAI 的新人工智能模型进行安全测试
items.desc_en: New agreements between the companies and the Commerce department build on Biden-era pacts.
items.desc_zh: 这些公司与商务部之间的新协议以拜登时代的协议为基础。

items.title_en: Pornhub to become accessible again for some UK users
items.title_zh: Pornhub 将再次对一些英国用户开放
items.desc_en: UK iPhone users who have completed Apple's device-based age checks will no longer be blocked from the site's adult content.
items.desc_zh: 完成 Apple 基于设备的年龄检查的英国 iPhone 用户将不再被阻止访问该网站的成人内容。
